text:
{
  "title": "Financial Statements Practical Examination",
   "description": "Using the information provided, prepare the required financial statement.",
   "timeLimit": 60,
   "passingScore": 70,
   "sections": [
       {
           "name": "A",
           "title": "Financial Statements (100 Marks)",
           "description": "Prepare the required financial statements.",
           "questions": [
               {
                   "questionNumber": 1,
                   "text": "Prepare an Income Statement",
                   "type": "financial-spreadsheet",
                   "points": 20,
                   "spreadsheetTemplate": {
                       "Sales Revenue": "",
                       "Cost of Goods Sold": "",
                       "Gross Profit": "",
                       "Salaries Expense": "",
                       "Rent Expense": "",
                       "Utilities Expense": "",
                       "Interest Expense": "",
                       "Net Profit": ""
                   },
                   "spreadsheetModelAnswer": {
                       "Sales Revenue": 25000000,
                       "Cost of Goods Sold": 15000000,
                       "Gross Profit": 10000000,
                       "Salaries Expense": 2500000,
                       "Rent Expense": 1200000,
                       "Utilities Expense": 300000,
                       "Interest Expense": 200000,
                       "Net Profit": 5800000
                   },
                   "correctAnswer": "See spreadsheetModelAnswer"
               },
               {
                   "questionNumber": 2,
                   "text": "Prepare a Statement of Financial Position (Balance Sheet)",
                   "type": "financial-spreadsheet",
                   "points": 20,
                   "spreadsheetTemplate": {
                       "Cash": "",
                       "Inventory": "",
                       "Accounts Receivable": "",
                       "Equipment": "",
                       "Accounts Payable": "",
                       "Bank Loan": "",
                       "Owner's Capital": ""
                   },
                   "spreadsheetModelAnswer": {
                       "Cash": 2000000,
                       "Inventory": 1500000,
                       "Accounts Receivable": 2500000,
                       "Equipment": 8000000,
                       "Accounts Payable": 2000000,
                       "Bank Loan": 3000000,
                       "Owner's Capital": 9000000
                   },
                   "correctAnswer": "See spreadsheetModelAnswer"
               },
               {
                   "questionNumber": 3,
                   "text": "Prepare a Cash Flow Statement (Indirect Format)",
                   "type": "financial-spreadsheet",
                   "points": 20,
                   "spreadsheetTemplate": {
                       "Net Profit": "",
                       "Depreciation": "",
                       "Increase in Accounts Receivable": "",
                       "Increase in Accounts Payable": "",
                       "Purchase of Equipment": "",
                       "Bank Loan Received": ""
                   },
                   "spreadsheetModelAnswer": {
                       "Net Profit": 6000000,
                       "Depreciation": 800000,
                       "Increase in Accounts Receivable": 400000,
                       "Increase in Accounts Payable": 300000,
                       "Purchase of Equipment": 2500000,
                       "Bank Loan Received": 4000000
                   },
                   "correctAnswer": "See spreadsheetModelAnswer"
               },
               {
                   "questionNumber": 4,
                   "text": "Prepare a Statement of Changes in Equity",
                   "type": "financial-spreadsheet",
                   "points": 20,
                   "spreadsheetTemplate": {
                       "Opening Capital": "",
                       "Additional Investment": "",
                       "Net Profit": "",
                       "Drawings": "",
                       "Closing Capital": ""
                   },
                   "spreadsheetModelAnswer": {
                       "Opening Capital": 12000000,
                       "Additional Investment": 2000000,
                       "Net Profit": 3500000,
                       "Drawings": 1000000,
                       "Closing Capital": 16500000
                   },
                   "correctAnswer": "See spreadsheetModelAnswer"
               },
               {
                   "questionNumber": 5,
                   "text": "Prepare Both an Income Statement and a Balance Sheet",
                   "type": "financial-spreadsheet",
                   "points": 20,
                   "spreadsheetTemplate": {
                       "Sales Revenue": "",
                       "Cost of Goods Sold": "",
                       "Gross Profit": "",
                       "Salaries Expense": "",
                       "Rent Expense": "",
                       "Cash": "",
                       "Inventory": "",
                       "Accounts Receivable": "",
                       "Equipment": "",
                       "Accounts Payable": "",
                       "Owner's Capital": ""
                   },
                   "spreadsheetModelAnswer": {
                       "Sales Revenue": 40000000,
                       "Cost of Goods Sold": 24000000,
                       "Gross Profit": 16000000,
                       "Salaries Expense": 5000000,
                       "Rent Expense": 2000000,
                       "Cash": 3500000,
                       "Inventory": 5000000,
                       "Accounts Receivable": 0,
                       "Equipment": 10000000,
                       "Accounts Payable": 4000000,
                       "Owner's Capital": 11500000
                   },
                   "correctAnswer": "See spreadsheetModelAnswer"
               }
           ]
       }
   ]
}

parsedContent.title: Financial Statements Practical Examination
parsedContent.description: Using the information provided, prepare the required financial statement.

questions.text: Prepare a Statement of Financial Position (Balance Sheet)
Prepare a Cash Flow Statement (Indirect Format)
Prepare a Statement of Changes in Equity
Prepare Both an Income Statement and a Balance Sheet
